name: io.github.musharna/data-aggregator-mcp
description: Find & fetch research datasets across 12 sources: Zenodo, DataCite, NCBI omics, literature, HuggingFace, DataONE, OmicsDI, DANDI, CELLxGENE, OpenML, PDB, GWAS Catalog.
title: Data Aggregator

environmentVariables.name: NCBI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional NCBI E-utilities API key; raises the rate limit 3->10 req/s for omics, literature, and taxonomy lookups.

environmentVariables.name: LLM_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of an OpenAI-compatible /chat/completions endpoint; enables search(understand=true) and search(multi_query=true).

environmentVariables.name: LLM_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for the LLM endpoint (LLM_API_BASE); omit for keyless local servers.

environmentVariables.name: LLM_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Model name passed to the LLM endpoint (default: gpt-4o-mini); set to whatever your endpoint serves.

environmentVariables.name: EMBEDDING_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of an OpenAI-compatible /embeddings endpoint; enables search(rank=semantic) re-ranking.

environmentVariables.name: EMBEDDING_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for the embeddings endpoint (EMBEDDING_API_BASE); omit for keyless local servers.

environmentVariables.name: EMBEDDING_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Model name passed to the embeddings endpoint (default: text-embedding-3-small).

environmentVariables.name: UNPAYWALL_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Email address sent to the Unpaywall API; required to enable the Unpaywall PDF fallback leg of literature full-text retrieval.
